bank_identity.name: Southeast Asia Commercial Joint Stock Bank (SeABank)
bank_identity.ticker: SSB (HOSE — Ho Chi Minh Stock Exchange)
bank_identity.report_source: FY2024 Press Release + Workshop Data (June 2025) + Data Request Responses

total_customers.source: CLIENT DATA — Data Request: 3,656,262 total retail customers

annual_revenue.source: DERIVED — 3,656,262 customers x $39.87 TOI/customer = $145.8M retail banking income.

operating_costs.source: DERIVED — Bank-wide OpEx ~$165M. Retail estimated at ~30% = $49.5M. Based on CIR 33.28%.

cost_to_income_ratio.source: FY2024 PRESS RELEASE — CIR 33.28%, well below Vietnamese banking average of 40-50%.

total_fte.source: CLIENT DATA — Data Request: 5,265 total FTE (3,136 branch + 2,129 back-office).

staff_costs.source: ESTIMATED — Bank-wide OpEx ~$165M, staff costs typically 50% = ~$82.5M.

additional_context.value: Temenos T24 R22 + Way4 card management

data_gaps.impact: Required to validate FTE hourly rate ($7.83) used in all servicing calculations
data_gaps.where_to_obtain: HR/Finance — returned N/A in data request

data_gaps.impact: Needed to size call center deflection savings independently
Validates STP improvement and digital lending shift assumptions

data_gaps.metric: Average Loan Size and Revenue per USL Product
data_gaps.impact: Validates $150/loan revenue assumption driving $2.6M CLO benefit
Would enable acquisition efficiency driver (not currently modeled)

basic_information.total_customers_source: CLIENT DATA — Data Request: 3,656,262 retail customers.
basic_information.operating_costs_source: ESTIMATED — Retail share of bank-wide OpEx. REQUIRES VALIDATION.
basic_information.total_fte_source: CLIENT DATA — 5,265 total FTE (3,136 branch + 2,129 back-office).
basic_information.average_fte_rate_source: DERIVED — Est. staff costs $82.5M / 5,265 FTE / 2,000 hrs = $7.83/hr. REQUIRES VALIDATION.

backbase_loading.notes: Per-category curves. Acquisition/Servicing ramp faster (30% Y1). Lending delayed (0% Y1, ramps Y2+). Retention delayed (0% Y1). STP tied to platform rollout. SeABank's 82% digital enrollment and 21.6% customer growth support faster adoption curves.

conservative.description: Phased rollout. Onboarding Y1, servicing Y2, lending Y3. Slower digital adoption in Vietnam market. Competition from Techcombank/VPBank limits uplift.

summary.desc: Conservative: Phased rollout with slower ramp. Negative NPV reflects Vietnam's low revenue-per-customer ($39.87) and low FTE rates ($7.83/hr). Model is structurally sound but requires either higher investment payback period or reduced implementation cost.

moderate.description: Unified platform with onboarding, CLO, and servicing. Strong executive sponsorship from Head of Retail + CIO. Acquisition partner pipeline accelerates customer growth.

summary.desc: Moderate: Full platform deployment with standard curves. Near break-even at Year 5. Vietnam's low per-customer economics require longer payback vs NAM/EMEA. Strong customer growth (8% YoY) and 10M target provide upside not fully captured.

aggressive.description: Fast-track all digital journeys. KOL acquisition channel and ecosystem partnerships (BRG, Prudential, PNJ) accelerate adoption. 10M customer target drives urgency.

summary.desc: Aggressive: Fast-track deployment. Reaches payback in Year 5 with 10% undiscounted ROI. Ecosystem partners (BRG, Prudential, PNJ, KOL) and 10M customer target provide significant upside not modeled.

license.source: ESTIMATE — Backbase Retail Banking platform license for 3.66M customers + Digital Onboarding + CLO + Engage modules. Vietnam market pricing. REQUIRES COMMERCIAL VALIDATION.

implementation.source: ESTIMATE — Y1: Core platform + onboarding + API integrations to T24/Way4. Y2: CLO + servicing + PFM. Y3: Optimization + ecosystem integrations. Assumes Backbase PS + local SI partner.

L1_digital_onboarding.current_state: Digital leakage ~80%. 513K app downloads/yr, 60% register (307K), ~255K complete. 40% drop between download and registration. Document upload is primary friction point.
L1_digital_onboarding.target_state: Digital leakage reduced to ~68%. Streamlined UX with save-and-resume, real-time eKYC, auto-capture. Recover 12% of lost digital prospects.

funnel_recovery.name: Digital Onboarding Funnel Recovery
funnel_recovery.description: Recover lost digital onboarding prospects via streamlined UX, progressive data capture with save-and-resume, and real-time eKYC. Gap: Client leakage ~80% vs BIC <50%. Gap = 30pp. Capture Rate = 0.40. Impact = 12pp leakage reduction.

annual_downloads.source: CLIENT DATA — App downloads (3-year average). Android: 153K, iOS: 361K.

current_drop_rate.source: CLIENT DATA — 40% drop between download and registration (513K to 307K).

net_incremental_factor.source: ESTIMATE — 60% of recovered customers are truly incremental (rest would have gone to branch).

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Client leakage: 80%. BIC: 50%. Gap: 30pp. Capture Rate: 0.40. Impact: 30pp x 0.40 = 12pp.
backbase_impact.assumption: Percentage of drop-off volume recovered by Backbase Digital Onboarding

branch_onboarding_shift.name: Branch-to-Digital Onboarding Migration
branch_onboarding_shift.description: Shift 25% of 193K annual branch openings to digital self-service, reducing per-account processing from 10 min to 2 min.

annual_branch_openings.source: CLIENT DATA — 193,177 branch account openings per year.

time_saved_hours.source: CLIENT DATA — Branch: 10 min, Digital: 2 min. Saved: 8 min = 0.133 hrs per account.
time_saved_hours.assumption: Time saved per shifted account (8 min)

fte_rate.source: DERIVED — Est. staff costs $82.5M / 5,265 FTE / 2,000 hrs = $7.83/hr.

backbase_impact.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — 20-30% branch-to-digital shift typical in first 2 years of digital onboarding.
backbase_impact.assumption: Percentage of branch openings shifted to digital

L2_cycle_time_acceleration.current_state: Onboarding takes 7+ days in some cases. STP rate <50%. Teams rely on manual workarounds. Multiple internal handoffs per application.
L2_cycle_time_acceleration.target_state: Same-day for STP-eligible applications, 1-2 days for exceptions. STP rate improved to 63% (from ~45%). Automated decisioning and parallel task processing.

processing_efficiency.name: Onboarding Processing Cost Reduction via STP
processing_efficiency.description: STP orchestration reduces manual processing per application. Gap: Client STP ~45% vs BIC >85%. Gap = 40pp. Capture Rate = 0.40. Impact = 16pp STP improvement.

annual_applications.source: DERIVED — 255K digital + 193K branch = ~448K total new accounts per year.

manual_processing_hours.source: ESTIMATE — 15 min average back-office processing per application (KYC check + account activation + compliance).
manual_processing_hours.assumption: Average back-office processing time per application

fte_rate.source: DERIVED — Est. staff costs / FTE / 2,000 hrs.

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Client STP: 45%. BIC: 85%. Gap: 40pp. Capture Rate: 0.40. Impact: 40pp x 0.40 = 16pp.
backbase_impact.assumption: STP improvement as fraction of current manual processing volume

L3_call_center_deflection.current_state: Call center handles 6,425 calls/month (77,100/yr) across 13 service types at ~3 min each. Simple requests (balance, card, transfers) still handled by agents. Deflection rate estimated <15%.
L3_call_center_deflection.target_state: Self-service deflection rate improved to ~31%. Digital banking self-service for balance, card controls, transfer support. AI chatbot for FAQ handling.

tasks.volume_source: CLIENT DATA — 1,560/month x 12. Routine balance checks.
tasks.impact_source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Self-service balance check deflects 65-75% of calls. Gap: <15% current deflection vs 60% BIC. Capture 0.35. Routine = high deflection.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — In-app card management deflects 45-55% of card service calls.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Complex: VDR 10-20%. Digital dispute initiation + agent workspace reduces handle time.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Self-service loan dashboard deflects 35-45% of loan inquiries.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — In-app CC management with statement/payment deflects 55-65%.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Transfer support deflected by digital self-service: 60-70%. Routine task.
BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Self-service product info and KYC update: 40-50% deflection.

L4_branch_servicing_migration.current_state: Branch handles 1.84M+ transactions/yr: 1.78M domestic transfers, 5.5K international transfers, 15K bill payments, 37.5K debit card orders. No visibility into why customers choose branch over digital (E6). Self-service rate ~35%.
L4_branch_servicing_migration.target_state: 19% branch-to-digital migration. Full transaction capability in mobile app. Behavioral nudges drive channel shift. Journey analytics provide channel choice visibility.

tasks.impact_source: GAP-BASED — Self-service rate: 35% current vs 90% BIC. Gap: 55pp. Capture: 0.35. Impact: 19pp. Domestic transfers = mixed task, VDR 20% conservative.

tasks.volume_source: CLIENT DATA — 462/month x 12 = 5,544/yr. TAT: 30 min branch.
tasks.time_source: INTERNAL PREP — Branch TAT 30 min per international transfer.
tasks.impact_source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Complex task: 10% digital shift for international transfers (recently launched online).

tasks.time_source: ESTIMATE — 5 min per bill payment at branch.
tasks.impact_source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Bill payments highly automatable: 50-70% digital migration. Routine task.

tasks.time_source: ESTIMATE — 8 min per card order at branch.
tasks.impact_source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Digital card ordering: 35-45% migration. Mixed task.

L5_digital_adoption.current_state: 12% digitally active rate (1 tx/month) despite 82% enrollment. Digital onboarding launched but hasn't scaled (E7). PFM has only 30K users vs 1M active digital users. No personalized nudges.
L5_digital_adoption.target_state: Digital active rate improved to 26% (+14pp). PFM-driven engagement, activation nudges, feature discovery. Higher revenue per digitally active customer through increased engagement.

adoption_revenue_uplift.name: Revenue Uplift from Digital Adoption Acceleration
adoption_revenue_uplift.description: Digitally active customers generate incremental revenue through higher engagement, cross-sell conversion, and lower churn. Gap: Client 12% vs BIC 60%. Gap = 48pp. Capture Rate = 0.30. Impact = 14.4pp increase in digital active rate.

digital_active_rate_uplift.source: GAP-BASED — Client: 12%. BIC: 60%. Gap: 48pp. Capture: 0.30. Impact: 14.4pp.

incremental_revenue_per_digital_customer.source: ESTIMATE — Digitally active customers generate ~10% more revenue than average ($39.87 x 10% = $3.99). Conservative estimate for Vietnamese retail.
incremental_revenue_per_digital_customer.assumption: Incremental annual revenue per newly digitally active customer

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Client digital active: 12%. BIC: 60%. Gap: 48pp. Capture: 0.30. Impact: 14pp.
backbase_impact.assumption: Backbase-attributable improvement in digital active rate

L6_backoffice_stp.group_name: L6: Back Office STP & Workaround Elimination
L6_backoffice_stp.current_state: STP rate <50%. Teams rely on manual workarounds (E8). Multiple internal handoffs (3-5 per application). Employees navigate 10+ systems. Extended cycle times are symptomatic of low automation.
L6_backoffice_stp.target_state: STP rate improved to 63% (+18pp). Flow Foundation provides automated decisioning and exception-only routing. Digital Assist eliminates swivel-chairing. Internal handoffs reduced to 1-2.

stp_improvement.name: Back-Office STP Improvement
stp_improvement.description: Flow Foundation automates validation, decisioning, and routing. Gap: Client STP ~45% vs BIC >85%. Gap = 40pp. Capture Rate = 0.45. Impact = 18pp STP improvement. Applied across all back-office processing volume.

annual_processing_volume.source: DERIVED — 448K new accounts + 60K lending applications + misc servicing requests = ~520K total back-office processing events.
annual_processing_volume.assumption: Total annual back-office transactions requiring manual processing

avg_processing_hours.source: ESTIMATE — 15 min average manual processing per event (validation, decisioning, data entry).
avg_processing_hours.assumption: Average manual processing time per back-office event

fte_rate.source: DERIVED — Est. staff costs / FTE / 2,000 hrs.

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Client STP: 45%. BIC: 85%. Gap: 40pp. Capture Rate: 0.45. Impact: 40pp x 0.45 = 18pp.
backbase_impact.assumption: Fraction of manual processing eliminated through STP

handoff_elimination.name: Internal Handoff Reduction
handoff_elimination.description: Reduce internal handoffs from 3-5 to 1-2 per application. Each handoff costs ~$3 in rework, context switching, and delay.

handoffs_eliminated.source: ESTIMATE — Reduce from avg 4 to avg 2 handoffs = 2 eliminated.
handoffs_eliminated.assumption: Number of handoffs eliminated per application

cost_per_handoff.source: ESTIMATE — ~23 min context switching/rework at $7.83/hr = ~$3 per handoff.

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Same as STP lever. Handoff reduction is a direct consequence of STP automation.

L7_digital_lending.current_state: 59,843 USL approved/year (overdraft + CC). No digital pre-approved offer channel — customers must visit branch. Pre-approval conversion <3%. IBM chosen for LOS but business team interested in Backbase digital lending.
L7_digital_lending.target_state: Pre-approved digital offers pushed to 439K digitally active customers via mobile app. 4% acceptance rate generates incremental lending revenue. Digital application with e-signature replaces branch visits.

clo_preapproved.name: Cross-Lending Origination (CLO) — Pre-Approved Digital Offers
clo_preapproved.description: Push pre-approved loan/CC offers to digitally active customers via mobile app. Gap: Client pre-approval conversion <3% vs BIC >25%. Gap = 22pp. Capture Rate = 0.35. Impact = 7.7pp conversion uplift.

digitally_active_customers.assumption: Digitally active customer base eligible for pre-approved offers

offer_acceptance_rate.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Pre-approved CLO acceptance rates: 3-6% in Southeast Asian retail.

annual_revenue_per_new_loan.source: ESTIMATE — NIM on avg $2K unsecured loan at ~7.5% margin. Requires validation with actual loan economics.
annual_revenue_per_new_loan.assumption: Annual NII per incremental loan product

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Client pre-approval conversion: 3%. BIC: 25%. Gap: 22pp. Capture Rate: 0.35. Impact: 22pp x 0.35 = 7.7pp ~ 8%.

stp_lending.name: STP Rate Improvement — Faster Loan Processing
stp_lending.description: Increase STP rate for loan applications, reducing manual intervention and application abandonment. 8% additional approvals from reduced processing friction.

additional_approval_rate.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — STP improvement recovers 5-10% of lost applications.

revenue_per_loan.source: Same as CLO revenue per loan.

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Same gap analysis as CLO. STP improvement enables the incremental approvals.

lending_processing_cost.name: Digital Lending Process Cost Reduction
lending_processing_cost.description: Shift 30% of USL processing from branch (10 min) to digital (2 min), saving 8 min per application.

time_saved_hours.source: CLIENT DATA — Branch: 10 min, Digital: 2 min. Saved: 8 min.

backbase_impact.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — 25-35% branch-to-digital shift for lending.
backbase_impact.assumption: Percentage of lending applications shifted to digital

L_retention.current_state: 2% annual churn (73K customers/yr). Product penetration: 2.53 (target: 4). 12% digitally active. PFM has only 30K users. No personalized nudges or contextual cross-sell. Affluent = 25% of portfolio but 80% of revenue.
L_retention.target_state: Churn reduced by 25% through digital engagement. Product penetration from 2.53 to 2.68 (+0.15) via PFM-driven cross-sell and contextual offers. Digital active rate to 25%.

churn_reduction.name: Customer Churn Reduction via Digital Engagement
churn_reduction.description: Improved digital experience, PFM tools, and proactive engagement reduce annual churn from 2% to 1.5%. Prevents loss of 18K customers/year. Gap: Client has limited digital engagement driving churn. Backbase Digital Engage enables proactive retention.

churn_reduction_rate.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — Digital engagement reduces retail churn by 20-30%.

backbase_impact.source: BENCHMARK — Backbase Digital Engage enables proactive retention. 25% churn reduction is within Backbase benchmark range of 20-30%.

product_penetration.name: Product Penetration Uplift via Digital Cross-Sell
product_penetration.description: PFM-driven insights, personalized nudges, and contextual CLO offers increase product penetration from 2.53 to 2.68 (+0.15). Revenue from incremental products across digitally active base.

incremental_products.source: ESTIMATE — Conservative: +0.15 from 2.53 baseline via digital nudges.
incremental_products.assumption: Incremental products per digitally active customer

revenue_per_product.source: ESTIMATE — Avg annual revenue per incremental product holding. Conservative for Vietnamese retail.

backbase_impact.source: GAP-BASED — Linked to L5 digital adoption. As digital active rate improves 14pp, cross-sell opportunity scales proportionally.

lever_summary.name: Digital Onboarding Funnel Recovery
lever_summary.change_driver: Streamlined UX with save-and-resume and real-time eKYC
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC <50% digital leakage (neobanks). Source: Backbase benchmarks (10+ banks)

lever_summary.name: Onboarding Cycle Time Acceleration
lever_summary.current_state: STP rate ~45%, 7+ day cycle time, manual workarounds
lever_summary.change_driver: Flow Foundation STP orchestration and automated decisioning
lever_summary.target_state: STP rate 63%, same-day processing for STP-eligible
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC >85% STP rate. Source: Backbase benchmarks (8+ banks)

lever_summary.name: Call Center Cost Deflection
lever_summary.current_state: 77K calls/yr, simple requests handled by agents, <15% deflection
lever_summary.change_driver: Self-service card controls, balance, transfers in mobile app

lever_summary.name: Branch-to-Digital Servicing Migration
lever_summary.current_state: 1.84M branch transactions/yr, $3-5 per interaction, no channel nudges
lever_summary.change_driver: Digital Banking full transaction capability and behavioral nudges
lever_summary.target_state: 19pp migration to digital, $0.25-0.40 per digital transaction
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC >90% self-service. Source: Backbase + LATAM benchmarks

lever_summary.name: Digital Banking Adoption Acceleration
lever_summary.current_state: 12% digitally active vs 82% enrolled, PFM only 30K users
lever_summary.change_driver: Modern mobile banking UX with activation nudges and PFM
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC >60% digital active rate. Source: Backbase benchmarks (12+ banks)

lever_summary.name: Back Office STP & Workaround Elimination
lever_summary.change_driver: Flow Foundation STP and Digital Assist unified workspace
lever_summary.target_state: STP 63%, 1-2 handoffs, automated validation and routing
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC >85% STP, <2 handoffs. Source: Backbase benchmarks (8+ banks)

lever_summary.name: Digital Lending Pre-Approved Origination
lever_summary.current_state: No digital pre-approved channel, <3% conversion, branch-only
lever_summary.change_driver: Digital Lending with pre-approved offer engine in mobile app
lever_summary.target_state: 8pp conversion uplift via digital pre-approved offers
lever_summary.benchmark: BIC >25% pre-approval conversion. Source: LATAM benchmarks

assumptions_register.source: CLIENT DATA — Definition: 1 transaction per month.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Determines addressable base for CLO and digital cross-sell

assumptions_register.source: CLIENT DATA — Product holding per active customer.
DERIVED — Est. staff costs / FTE / 2,000 hrs. Cost per FTE returned N/A in data request.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Multiplied across all servicing calculations

assumptions_register.source: DERIVED — 513K downloads, 307K register (60%), ~255K complete (~50%). Leakage from start to complete ~80%. Aligns with Average benchmark (70-90%).
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Drives L1 funnel recovery sizing

assumptions_register.source: INFERRED — Evidence: 'teams still rely on manual workarounds' (E8). Poor range is <50%.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Drives L2 and L6 sizing

assumptions_register.source: BACKBASE BENCHMARK — SE Asian retail CLO: 3-6%.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Primary driver of lending revenue

assumptions_register.source: ESTIMATE — NIM on avg $2K unsecured loan at ~7.5% margin.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Directly impacts lending journey benefit
HIGH — All VND values converted at this rate

assumptions_register.source: INFERRED — Evidence: simple requests still come through call center (E5), digital hasn't scaled (E7). Poor benchmark: <20%.
INFERRED — Target 70% online but currently far from it. APAC average ~50-65%, SeABank below average given evidence.
ESTIMATE — Requires commercial validation with Backbase pricing team.
assumptions_register.sensitivity: HIGH — Determines ROI, NPV, and payback

data_gaps_for_validation.source: HR/Finance — returned N/A in data request
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Validates FTE hourly rate ($7.83) used in all servicing and efficiency calculations

data_gaps_for_validation.data_needed: Call Center FTE count and cost structure
data_gaps_for_validation.source: Head of Contact Center — not provided in data request
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Validates call center deflection savings and sizes staffing benefit

data_gaps_for_validation.data_needed: USL application funnel by channel (starts, completed, approved)
data_gaps_for_validation.source: Head of Retail Lending — multiple fields returned N/A
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Validates STP improvement rate and digital lending shift assumptions

data_gaps_for_validation.data_needed: Average loan size and revenue per unsecured loan product
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Validates $150/loan revenue assumption driving CLO benefit

data_gaps_for_validation.data_needed: Digital onboarding funnel with exact step-level drop-off reasons
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Validates funnel recovery assumptions and sizes onboarding revenue benefit

data_gaps_for_validation.data_needed: Segment-level P&L (Mass vs Affluent vs Priority)
data_gaps_for_validation.impact: Would enable segment-specific ROI and validate 'Affluent = 80% revenue' assertion
